## Troubleshooting

Please avoid these issues:

- Missing or wrong style of ORCID

- Missing answer

- No answer boxes contain accidental spaces. If a space was entered by mistake and you see a “Clear answer” option appear underneath, click it to remove the space.

- Wrong answer (providing text instead of a nanopublication)

- For some question(s), you did not select a resource

## Preview

By choosing **HTML Preview** of the **Nanopublication Template** (in **Settings** - 22)

![Figure 22](/docs/fip/_static/img/22.png){fig-align="left" width="45%"}

you can see in **Preview mode** the question that needs revision (23).

![Figure 23](/docs/fip/_static/img/23.png){fig-align="left" width="50%"}
